summary: Blackstone Inc. is exploring a sale of its payments services provider SP.LINKS Inc., likely turning a profit a little more than two years after it bought the firm, according to people familiar with the matter.

title_cn: 亿万富翁安巴尼的 Jiostar 平台押注全人工智能系列
summary: Indian billionaire Mukesh Ambani’s streaming platform is preparing to fully embrace AI-generated content, after its first experiment — a machine-made retelling of a 2,500-year-old war epic — convinced executives there’s real money in the idea.

title: Gold Slips as Uncertainty Clouds Negotiations to End US-Iran War
title_cn: 结束美伊战争的谈判充满不确定性，金价下跌
summary: Gold edged lower as renewed clashes in the Middle East cast doubt over negotiations between the US and Iran to end the war that’s upended energy flows and heightened inflation concerns.

title: Marcos Says Philippines May Need Extra Budget Amid Oil Shock
title_cn: 马科斯表示菲律宾在石油危机中可能需要额外预算
summary: Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. said his government is considering passing a supplemental budget to help the public cope with the oil crisis, as he urged the Senate to return to work.

title: Revolut Founder Storonsky Sets Launch Pad for $76 Billion Fortune
title_cn: Revolut 创始人 Storonsky 为财富 760 亿美元设立启动平台
summary: Revolut CEO Nikolay Storonsky could be set for a $76 billion fortune in stock if the bank he founded can pull off a near-$200 billion initial public offering that it's planning within the next two years. Storonsky’s wealth and its prospective jump hinges on Revolut’s valuation and performance targets. The firm wants 100 million daily active customers across 100 countries. Bloomberg's Aisha S Gani has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indonesian Stocks Slump to Five-Year Low, Rupiah Drops to Record
title_cn: 印尼股市跌至五年低点，卢比跌至历史新高
summary: Indonesian stocks plunged to their lowest level in five years and the rupiah hit a record low in another stark reminder of the multi-faceted challenges confronting Southeast Asia’s biggest economy.

title: Pompeo Warns of Rising Global Flashpoints
title_cn: 蓬佩奥警告全球热点问题上升
summary: Former US Secretary of State Mike Pompeo outlines mounting geopolitical risks, cautioning about the outlook of the Iran war, the evolving dynamics of US-China relations and the broader challenges facing American foreign policy. He speaks with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of 'Nomura Investment Forum Asia' in Singapore. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Storm Jangmi Nears Tokyo, Flights Halted
title_cn: 风暴“蔷薇”逼近东京，航班暂停
summary: Tropical Storm Jangmi is bearing down on Tokyo, bringing heavy rain, strong winds and widespread disruption. Nearly 880 flights have been canceled at airports in the Tokyo area, while power outages have been reported across Japan. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Extends Advance as US-Iran Peace Talk Progress Stalls
title_cn: 美伊和平谈判进展停滞，石油价格上涨
summary: Oil rose for a third day on pessimism over the prospects of the US and Iran reaching a peace deal and as fresh fighting flared up in the Middle East.

title: Bank Lending in India Hits Two-Year High as Companies Skip Bonds
title_cn: 由于企业跳过债券，印度银行贷款创两年新高
summary: Bank lending in India is expanding at the fastest pace in nearly two years as companies choose loans over bonds as a cheaper source of financing.

title: Dubai-Based Apparel Group Said to Explore IPO for India Business
title_cn: 总部位于迪拜的服装集团据称将探索印度业务的首次公开募股
summary: Dubai-based fashion and lifestyle retailer Apparel Group is considering an initial public offering for its Indian unit in Mumbai, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Stocks Extend Record Rally on AI, Crude Oil Climbs: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 人工智能、原油价格上涨，股市延续创纪录的涨势：市场总结
summary: Global equities advanced to new highs as demand for artificial-intelligence stocks intensified, cementing the sector’s role as the market’s main driver.

title: Yen Hovers Near 160 Per Dollar as Traders Eye Intervention Risk
title_cn: 交易员关注干预风险，日元兑美元徘徊在 160 附近
summary: The yen hovered neared the 160 level versus the dollar on Wednesday amid heightened concern among traders that Japan may intervene in the market again to prop up the currency.

title: Stocks Steady as Middle East Tensions Send Oil Higher
title_cn: 中东紧张局势推高油价，股市稳定

title: SpaceX Is Said to Plan IPO Terms as Early as Today
title_cn: 据称 SpaceX 最早将于今日计划 IPO 条款
summary: SpaceX is planning to set the terms of its initial public offering as early as Wednesday afternoon, according to people familiar with the matter. Separately, a report by Reuters said Elon Musk’s rocket launch, satellite and AI company aims to sell 555.6 million shares ​at $135 apiece for its record-breaking $75 ​billion ⁠listing. Bloomberg's Danny Lee has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Boom Fuels Stock Surge; US Proposes New Tariffs | The China Show 6/3/2026
title_cn: 人工智能热潮助推股市飙升；美国提出新关税|中国展 2026 年 6 月 3 日
summary:
Bloomberg: The China Show is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy.  From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Demand for Australia Seven-Year Debt Climbs as RBA Signals Pause
title_cn: 澳大利亚央行发出暂停信号，澳大利亚七年期国债需求攀升
summary: A gauge of demand for Australian government bonds due in seven years surged at auction Wednesday as investors increasingly bet the Reserve Bank’s tightening cycle is nearing an end.

title: Edge AI Startup Kneron On Growth Strategy
title_cn: 边缘人工智能初创公司 Kneron 谈增长战略
summary: Albert Liu, Founder and CEO of Kneron, explains how his company plans to capitalize on what he sees as the next phase of AI infrastructure. He also speaks with Stephen Engle about fundraising plans on the sidelines of Computex in Taipei.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Proposes New Levies of at Least 10% to Rebuild Tariff Wall
title_cn: 特朗普提议征收至少 10% 的新税以重建关税墙
summary: The US is proposing new tariffs of at least 10% on imports from 60 trading partners following an investigation into goods allegedly produced by forced labor, as President Donald Trump seeks to rebuild the sweeping tariff wall struck down by the US Supreme Court.

title: Pompeo, Markets React to US Tariffs Over Alleged Forced Labor
title_cn: 蓬佩奥，市场对美国因涉嫌强迫劳动而征收的关税做出反应
summary: The US is proposing tariffs of at least 10% on imports from most major trading partners after an investigation into alleged forced labor. Mike Pompeo, former US state secretary, offers his view as investors also parse the latest development. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Australian Pension Seeks Apartments as Build-to-Rent Costs Rise
title_cn: 随着建房出租成本上升，澳大利亚养老金寻求公寓
summary: One of Australia’s largest pension funds is snapping up completed apartment blocks rather than backing new developments, betting that high construction costs and interest rates make build-to-rent projects too risky.

title: Strait Talk About Geography, Destiny and Tech Stocks
title_cn: 海峡谈论地理、命运和科技股
summary: The chips rally highlights how free the IT sector is from constraints like oil and Hormuz.

title: Chinese Investors Exit Hong Kong Stocks as AI Woos Money Onshore
title_cn: 人工智能吸引境内资金，中国投资者退出港股
summary: Chinese investors are exiting Hong Kong‑listed stocks in record numbers, highlighting waning appetite as mainland AI shares broaden their appeal.

title: BYD-Backed Robotics Firm PaXini Is Said to Explore Hong Kong IPO
title_cn: 比亚迪支持的机器人公司 PaXini 据称将探索香港 IPO
summary: PaXini Tech, a maker of dexterous robotic hands and humanoid robots, is considering a Hong Kong initial public offering, people familiar with the matter said, the latest in the sector looking to tap investor demand.

title: Goldman Lifts Kospi Target to 12,000, Upgrades Taiwan to Buy
title_cn: 高盛将 Kospi 目标上调至 12,000 点，上调台湾买入评级
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. boosted its outlook for South Korean and Taiwanese stocks, as the artificial intelligence boom drives profits in the tech-heavy markets.

title: Guinea’s Simandou Iron Exports Surge Six Months After First Ore
title_cn: 几内亚西芒杜铁出口在第一批矿石上市六个月后激增
summary: Exports from Guinea’s Simandou iron ore project surged in May, six months after the first shipment to China, marking a milestone in the ramp-up of the high-grade mine that has the potential to reshape the global market.

title: India’s Oil Demand Growth Set for Pandemic Low on War Crunch
title_cn: 由于战争紧缩，印度石油需求增长因疫情而降至低点
summary: India’s oil demand growth this year could tumble to its lowest level since the pandemic as the fallout from the Middle East conflict saps fuel consumption in the world’s third-biggest crude importer.

title: Copper Declines From Three-Week High as Traders Track Iran War
title_cn: 随着交易商追踪伊朗战争，铜价从三周高位下跌
summary: Copper fell from a three-week high amid pessimism over the outlook for a deal to end the Middle East war.

title: Wedbush's Ives on AI Rally, SpaceX IPO
title_cn: 韦德布什 (Wedbush) 的艾夫斯谈人工智能集会和 SpaceX IPO
summary: Dan Ives, Global Head of Technology Research at Wedbush Securities, discusses the revival of the AI trade and looks ahead to the listings of OpenAI, Anthropic and SpaceX. He speaks with Haidi Stroud-Watts and Paul Allen on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Party to 'Continue Until 4AM': Dan Ives
title_cn: AI 派对“持续到凌晨 4 点”：Dan Ives
summary: Dan Ives, Wedbush Securities Global Head of Technology Research, describes the bull run in AI equities as a "party" that is set to continue until late in the night - projecting confidence in a long-term run of high equity prices. He speaks after Alphabet stocks slid following the announcement of a billion-dollar equity round to pay for AI infrastructure. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oasis Says Japan AGM Proposal Hurts Retail Investors
title_cn: 绿洲称日本年度股东大会提案伤害了散户投资者
summary: Japan’s plan to tighten the threshold for shareholder proposals would hurt retail investors while having little impact on institutional activist investors, said Seth Fischer, the founder of Oasis Management Co.

title: SpaceX Seeks $135 a Share for $75 Billion IPO, Reuters Says
title_cn: 路透社称，SpaceX 寻求以每股 135 美元的价格进行 750 亿美元的 IPO
summary: SpaceX aims to sell 555.6 million shares ​at $135 apiece for its record-breaking $75 ​billion ⁠initial public ​offering, Reuters reported, citing an unidentified person familiar with the matter.

title: Google Forced by UK to Make Changes to AI Search Summaries
title_cn: 英国迫使谷歌更改人工智能搜索摘要
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google must make changes to its artificial intelligence generated search summaries after the UK’s antitrust watchdog forced it to give publishers more control over how their content is used.

title: EU’s AI Data Center Plans Stumble Due to Delays, Funding
title_cn: 欧盟人工智能数据中心计划因延误和资金而陷入困境
summary: The European Union’s €20 billion ($23.3 billion) investment plan for five massive artificial intelligence data centers is floundering, with delays and funding issues alienating some potential partners, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Delta Electronics Flags Power Crunch
title_cn: 台达电子标志着电力紧缩
summary: The third-heaviest weighed company on the Taiwan stock exchange has flagged incoming power crunch and key components shortage amid rising demand of AI servers in the current geopolitical scenario. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Palantir’s $445 Million NHS Deal Under Fire From UK Lawmakers
title_cn: Palantir 4.45 亿美元的 NHS 交易遭到英国立法者的批评
summary: British members of parliament are calling on the government to end a major deal with Palantir Technologies Inc. and disclose more details of a military contract with the company, as UK political tension involving the controversial data firm ramps up.

title: TikTok Billionaire Tops Ambani as Asia’s Second-Richest
title_cn: TikTok亿万富翁超越安巴尼成为亚洲第二富豪
summary: TikTok billionaire Zhang Yiming has overtaken India’s Mukesh Ambani to become Asia’s second-richest person after a rise in ByteDance’s valuation and further progress in the Chinese firm’s AI ambitions. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Toilet Maker Toto Ramps Up Its Ceramics for AI Chipmakers
title_cn: 马桶制造商 Toto 为人工智能芯片制造商提升陶瓷产品
summary: Japanese toilet maker Toto Ltd. expects spending in its chip-related operations to make up more than half its total capex in coming years, as it chases new gains from an artificial intelligence surge.

title: Global Funds Buy Japan as They Flee Asia’s Hottest Stock Markets
title_cn: 全球基金逃离亚洲最热门股市，买入日本股票
summary: The global AI trade has turned South Korea and Taiwan into Asia’s top two stock markets this year. Yet for foreign investors, the region’s most compelling destination lies elsewhere: Japan.

title: Baidu CFO Haijian He on AI Revenue, Robotaxis
title_cn: Baidu CFO Haijian He on AI Revenue, Robotaxis
summary: Baidu CFO Haijian He speaks to Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin about how the company's AI-related revenue has reached 50%, explaining the benefits of its integrated services offering and the potential of its robotaxi business. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bizlink COO on Business Strategy, AI Boom
title_cn: Bizlink 首席运营官谈商业战略、AI Boom
summary: Florian Hettich, COO at Bizlink, discusses the company's business strategy and the impact from the AI boom. He speaks with Stephen Engle from the sidelines of Computex in Taipei. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Megaport to Raise $594 Million in Australia to Fund AI Expansion
title_cn: Megaport 将在澳大利亚筹集 5.94 亿美元，资助人工智能扩张
summary: Australia’s Megaport Ltd. is seeking to raise A$827.3 million ($594 million) to support the creation of an artificial intelligence inference cloud and execute new contracts, one of the country’s biggest deals this year as companies look to finance the global data center buildout.

title: US Consumer Watchdog Met With Bilt to Talk Customer Challenges
title_cn: 美国消费者监管机构面临 Bilt to Talk 客户挑战
summary: The US Consumer Financial Protection Bureau worked with the financial-technology firm Bilt Technologies Inc. to learn how the firm addressed consumer concerns around a credit-card portfolio transition months after that switch occurred.

title: Applied Aerospace & Defense Said to Raise $650 Million in US IPO
title_cn: 应用航空航天与应用据称国防部将在美国首次公开募股中筹集 6.5 亿美元
summary: Applied Aerospace & Defense Inc., a space and defense engineering firm, raised $650 million in an initial public offering, according to a person familiar with the matter.

title: Forces of AI Are Releasing a Capex Boom, Rosenberg Says
title_cn: 罗森伯格表示，人工智能的力量正在释放资本支出热潮
summary: Jeffrey Rosenberg, BlackRock portfolio manager of the iShares systematic alternatives active ETF, says the forces of AI are unleashing a capex boom and creating an incredible wealth effect. He speaks at an exclusive event for Bloomberg.com subscribers in New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Valve, the Anticorporate Hero of the Games Industry, Has Its Antitrust Moment
title_cn: Valve，游戏行业的反企业英雄，迎来了反垄断时刻
summary: Lawsuits in the US and the UK allege the company’s Steam store is abusing its market power. Valve disagrees.

title: GameStop Posted Its Highest Profit Ever By Selling Action Figures and Cards
title_cn: GameStop 通过销售人偶和卡片实现了有史以来最高的利润
summary: GameStop Corp. shares climbed as much as 13% in after-hours trading after the video-game retailer reported a record quarterly profit driven by its collectibles business.

title: Back On Being Bitcoin Creator: 'Hard to Prove Negative'
title_cn: 重返比特币创造者：“很难证明消极”
summary: Adam Back, co-founder and CEO of Blockstream, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Back is often considered to be the creator of Bitcoin, which he has repeatedly denied. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NYU’s Gary Marcus: Today Marks a US AI Policy Milestone
title_cn: 纽约大学的加里·马库斯：今天标志着美国人工智能政策的里程碑
summary: Gary Marcus, NYU Emeritus Professor of Psychology and Neural Science and founder of Robust.AI and Geometric.AI, joined the program to discuss the recent executive order on AI regulation. He described the order as a significant reversal from the previous administration's hands-off approach, which he viewed as untenable. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Prediction Market Bettors Lagging Sports Gamblers: Report
title_cn: 预测市场投注者落后于体育投注者：报告
summary: Bloomberg's Ira Boudway joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Traders on prediction markets fare worse than traditional sports bettors on increasingly popular multi-leg wagers, according to an analysis by Citizens. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fireblocks CEO Discusses Flow Launch, Payment Growth
title_cn: Fireblocks 首席执行官讨论 Flow 推出和支付增长
summary: Michael Shaulov, CEO of Fireblocks, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Fireblocks, the crypto infrastructure company launched Fireblocks Flow today as part of the Money 20/20 conference in Amsterdam.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Musk Allies Back Ex-DOGE Staffers Trying to Use AI to Cut Waste
title_cn: 马斯克盟友支持前 DOGE 员工尝试使用人工智能减少浪费
summary: Two former staffers from the Department of Government Efficiency have unveiled a new venture to buy companies and cut waste by implementing artificial intelligence, applying DOGE’s cost-cutting project to the private sector.

title: Huge AI Bonuses Spark South Korea Tech Wealth Fight
title_cn: 巨额人工智能奖金引发韩国科技财富之争
summary: Samsung averted a crippling strike by paying massive bonuses to its chip workers. But the move has sparked resentment in other divisions, fueling a global debate about how to share AI windfalls.

title: Marvell Soars the Most Since 2000 After $1 Trillion Stock Call
title_cn: Marvell 股票上涨 1 万亿美元，股价创 2000 年以来最大涨幅
summary: Marvell Technology Inc. shares surged the most in 26 years after Nvidia Corp.’s Jensen Huang predicted that the semiconductor and networking company would be the next business to hit a $1 trillion valuation.

title: Clients Looking for Asset Distribution: Dixon
title_cn: 寻求资产分配的客户：Dixon
summary:
Denelle Dixon, CEO of Stellar Development Foundation, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation said last week it plans to connect its tokenized securities platform to the Stellar network. 

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Palo Alto Networks Raises Profit Outlook, Citing AI Demand
title_cn: Palo Alto Networks 以人工智能需求为由上调利润预期
summary: Palo Alto Networks Inc. released a forecast for adjusted earnings that was stronger than anticipated, signaling ongoing demand for security services as artificial intelligence-related threats continue to raise concerns for companies and governments.

title: HPE Soars by Record After Raising AI-Fueled Sales Forecast
title_cn: 上调人工智能驱动的销售预测后，HPE 股价飙升创纪录
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co. shares had their best day ever after the company gave an outlook for annual sales that topped Wall Street’s estimates, citing massive growth in AI-fueled demand for its servers and networking.

title: Prosus Gets Until Oct. 11 for Delivery Hero Sale After Uber Bid
title_cn: Prosus 在 Uber 竞标后于 10 月 11 日之前进行“Delivery Hero”促销
summary: The European Commission is planning to extend a critical deadline for Prosus NV to sell down a stake in Delivery Hero SE to October, buying the investor some meaningful time to thwart another possible takeover attempt of the food delivery service by Uber Technologies Inc.

title: Fresh US-Iran Fighting Puts Ceasefire Under Strain
title_cn: 美国与伊朗的新战斗使停火面临压力
summary: US forces intercepted Iranian ballistic missiles and drones aimed at neighboring Middle East countries and struck a command center in the Islamic Republic in response. The exchange followed days of Israeli military escalation against Iran-backed Hezbollah in Lebanon. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar breaks down the situation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Becerra, Hilton Take Early Lead in California Governor Race
title_cn: 贝塞拉和希尔顿在加州州长竞选中领先
summary: Republican Steve Hilton and Democrat Xavier Becerra surged to the top of California’s crowded gubernatorial primary, with billionaire Tom Steyer trailing in a contest shaped by money, scandal and uncertainty.

title: Kenya Pressed on Details of Ebola Center Deal With US
title_cn: 肯尼亚就与美国的埃博拉中心协议细节施压
summary: A Kenyan high court instructed the authorities to disclose details of an agreement with the US government to establish an Ebola quarantine facility in the East African nation. The latest outbreak of Ebola has been concentrated in northeastern Democratic Republic of Congo and been declared a global emergency by the World Health Organization. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Left With Few Choices, EU Braces for a Trade Fight With China
title_cn: 欧盟别无选择，准备迎接与中国的贸易战
summary: The European Union is gearing up to warn its citizens and companies about a potential trade war with China as the bloc starts weighing new restrictive measures against Beijing aimed at resetting an imbalanced economic relationship.

title: Trump Proposes New Tariffs of at Least 10%
title_cn: 特朗普提议征收至少 10% 的新关税
summary: The US is proposing new tariffs of at least 10% on imports from 60 trading partners following an investigation into goods allegedly produced by forced labor, as President Donald Trump seeks to rebuild the sweeping tariff wall struck down by the US Supreme Court. Bloomberg's Ros Mathieson reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indonesia Raids Agency Running $15 Billion Free Meals Program
title_cn: 印度尼西亚突袭机构运行 150 亿美元的免费餐食计划
summary: Indonesian prosecutors raided the headquarters of President Prabowo Subianto’s flagship free meals program a day after its leader was removed from office amid incidents of food poisoning and operational challenges.

title: Venezuela Rodríguez to Visit India as War Reshapes Oil Trade
title_cn: 战争重塑石油贸易，委内瑞拉罗德里格斯将访问印度
summary: Venezuela’s acting President Delcy Rodríguez will meet Prime Minister Narendra Modi this week, with energy security expected to dominate discussions as India seeks to diversify crude supplies disrupted by the Iran war.

title: South Korea’s Lee Faces First Election Test a Year Into Term
title_cn: 韩国李在镕面临上任一年后的首次选举考验
summary: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung faces his first electoral test a year into his term with local votes that could boost his party’s influence throughout the nation or show the limitations of his appeal as the main opposition party tries to rebuild itself.

title: Swiss Population Cap Opponents Gain Lead for First Time in Polls
title_cn: 瑞士人口上限反对者在民调中首次领先
summary: A proposal to cap Switzerland’s population at 10 million people has lost ground among voters, with opposition to the idea now above 50% for the first time, according to final polls before a national vote this month.

title: US Advances Vietnam C-130 Deal With $100 Million Support Package
title_cn: 美国通过 1 亿美元的支持计划推进越南 C-130 交易
summary: The US has approved a possible $100 million foreign military sale to Vietnam for C-130 Hercules sustainment services and related equipment, advancing what could be one of the Southeast Asian nation’s most significant defense procurements from Washington in years.

title: US, Iran Exchange Military Strikes to Put Fresh Strains on Ceasefire
title_cn: 美国和伊朗相互军事打击，给停火带来新的压力
summary: US forces intercepted Iranian ballistic missiles and drones aimed at neighboring Middle East countries and struck a command center in the Islamic Republic in response — the latest flare-up to test a fragile ceasefire.

title: US Tariff Threats Give Lula a New Election Attack on Bolsonaro
title_cn: 美国关税威胁让卢拉在选举中对博尔索纳罗发起新的攻击
summary: Hours after the US proposed 25% tariffs on Brazil, President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva had found a way to seize on the threat.

title: Paxton Meets Trump at White House as Texas Senate Race Heats Up
title_cn: 德克萨斯州参议院竞选升温，帕克斯顿在白宫会见特朗普
summary: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton met Tuesday with President Donald Trump at the White House as the Republican Senate nominee tries to consolidate his support and boost fundraising in one of the country’s most competitive midterm races.

title: US Looks to Unblock Hormuz With Quiet Version of Project Freedom
title_cn: 美国希望通过安静版本的自由计划来解除对霍尔木兹的封锁
summary: A month after President Donald Trump announced — and then abandoned — a plan to escort commercial ships through the Strait of Hormuz, the US military is trying less public ways of protecting vessels in the vital waterway.

title: Singapore State Minister Back as Surgeon After Political Office
title_cn: 新加坡国务部长卸任后重返外科医生岗位
summary: Koh Poh Koon, who stepped down as Singapore’s senior minister of state for manpower and health for family reasons, is returning to the healthcare industry as a surgeon.

title: Solomon Islands Leader Says He’ll Review China Security Deal
title_cn: 所罗门群岛领导人表示将审查中国安全协议
summary: The new leader of the Solomon Islands will review a 2022 security deal with China, an agreement that sparked alarm from Australia, the US and others.

title: Trump Backs De la Espriella Ahead of Colombia Runoff
title_cn: 特朗普在哥伦比亚决选前支持德拉埃斯普里埃拉
summary: Donald Trump endorsed celebrity lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella before a runoff election in Colombia, a fresh bid by the US president to inject himself into the politics of a Latin American neighbor.

title: Absent NJ Lawmaker Kean Will Face Bennett in November Election
title_cn: 缺席的新泽西州议员基恩将在 11 月选举中面对贝内特
summary: Former US Navy helicopter pilot Rebecca Bennett was projected to win the Democratic primary for a key suburban New Jersey House seat, setting up a November showdown against a Republican congressman whose prolonged absence from public view has reshaped one of the most competitive midterm races.

title: Acting AG Blanche Not Moving Forward With $1.8B Fund | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/02/2026
title_cn: Acting AG Blanche 没有继续推进 $1.8B 基金 | Acting AG Blanche权力平衡：最新版 06/02/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Rep. Suhas Subramanyam (D-VA), says FHFA chief Bill Pulte is "absolutely not qualified" to serve as acting director of national intelligence and expects the Trump administration to rely more on acting officials to advance the president's agenda without Senate confirmation. Aalok Mehta, Director of the Wadhwani AI Center at the Center for Strategic and International Studies, says it is unclear what President Trump's executive order establishing voluntary federal reviews of advanced AI models will accomplish. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Netanyahu Problem Is Latest Key Hurdle to Iran Deal
title_cn: 特朗普的内塔尼亚胡问题是伊朗协议的最新关键障碍
summary: President Donald Trump has spent months projecting confidence that a deal to end the Iran conflict is within reach. Israel’s determination to press ahead with its own objectives underscores his tenuous control over the outcome of the crisis.

title: Trump Administration Seeks Public Comment on China Trade Board
title_cn: 特朗普政府就中国贸易委员会征求公众意见
summary: The Trump administration is seeking public comment on its plans to create a Board of Trade to manage economic ties with China, moving ahead with the formal process to create the new mechanism.

title: Mehta: Trump AI Order Replicates Existing AI Efforts
title_cn: 梅塔：特朗普的人工智能命令复制了现有的人工智能努力
summary: Aalok Mehta, Director of the Wadhwani AI Center at the Center for Strategic and International Studies, says it is unclear what President Trump's executive order establishing voluntary federal reviews of advanced AI models will accomplish, pointing out that major AI labs already have agreements to work with the government on testing. Mehta says the order reflects a compromise between administration officials concerned about cybersecurity risks and those more receptive to industry concerns. He speaks with Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fish, Foxes and Frogs Shortlisted to Oust Churchill on UK Cash
title_cn: 鱼、狐狸和青蛙入围英国现金驱逐丘吉尔
summary: The British public has a month to decide the four wild animals that will replace historical figures like Winston Churchill on the next series of sterling banknotes, as the Bank of England presses ahead with plans that have infuriated traditionalists.

title: Trump to Drop $1.8 Billion Fund in IRS Deal, Keeps Tax Probe Ban
title_cn: 特朗普将在国税局协议中放弃 18 亿美元资金，并维持税收调查禁令
summary: The Trump administration is moving to drop controversial plans for a $1.8 billion fund to pay victims of alleged government “weaponization,” but will still provide immunity from any probes into the president’s past tax filings under a deal agreed to last month.

title: Mexican Teachers Threaten to Disrupt World Cup Over Wages
title_cn: 墨西哥教师威胁要因工资问题扰乱世界杯
summary: Mexican teachers seeking higher wages are threatening to disrupt World Cup games, piling pressure on organizers already facing questions over airport capacity, traffic congestion and security risks in some host cities.

title: S&P 500 Reaches Ninth Straight Day of Gains | The Close 6/2/2026
title_cn: 标准普尔 500 指数连续第九个交易日上涨 |收盘价 2026 年 6 月 2 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Franklin Templeton’s Dina Ting, Charles Schwab Head of Trading Services James Kostulias, Microsoft EVP of CoreAI Jay Parikh, NYU Emeritus Professor of Psychology & Neural Science Gary Marcus, Rockefeller Global Family Office CIO Jimmy Chang, Laffer Tengler Investments CEO & CIO Nancy Tengler, Allspring Global Investments Senior Portfolio Analyst Abby Roach, Center for American Progress Senior Fellow Jared Bernstein, Talwar Global Strategies Principal Puneet Talwar, & NY Giants QB Jameis Winston & Kinexx Chairman Adrian Muhammad. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Appeals Trade Court Order for Broad IEEPA Tariff Refunds
title_cn: 美国上诉贸易法院命令要求广泛 IEEPA 关税退款
summary: The Trump administration has formally appealed a judge’s order compelling customs authorities to refund all importers who paid the $166 billion in global tariffs that the US Supreme Court declared unlawful earlier this year.

title: Rep. Subramanyam Warns Pulte Risks Politicize Intelligence
title_cn: 众议员苏布拉马尼亚姆警告普尔特风险将情报政治化
summary: Rep. Suhas Subramanyam (D-VA), ranking member on the House Oversight Subcommittee on Military and Foreign Affairs, says FHFA chief Bill Pulte is "absolutely not qualified" to serve as acting director of national intelligence and expects the Trump administration to rely more on acting officials to advance the president's agenda without Senate confirmation. Subramanyam also weighs in on the Justice Department's scrapped $1.8 billion "anti-weaponization" fund and Trump's executive order creating a voluntary review process for advanced AI models. He speaks with Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)
